notes: parent_company: Ashton | Ashton portfolio — Mild-to-medium pillar — aged Connecticut Shade, more complex and velvety than Classic.
wrapperRole: Aged Connecticut Shade adds toasted nuts, cream, and sweet wood over Classic polish.
binderRole: Dominican binder keeps Fuente-made burn smooth and consistent.
fillerRole: Dominican filler delivers gentle body with nutty, creamy depth.
flavorNotes: toasted nuts, cream, sweet wood, cedar, light pepper
bestFor: Cappuccino, light roast coffee, blonde ale, delicate Irish whiskey, Chardonnay.
avoidIf: User wants full-bodied power, Islay peat, or dark maduro sweetness only.
whyRecommend: Recommend when the user wants Ashton cream with more complexity than Classic — not VSG strength.
catalogLine: Ashton Cabinet Selection · 6 × 50 · Toro · Medium · Dominican · $13 · Notes: toasted nuts, cream, sweet wood
memberBlurb: Ashton Cabinet — aged Connecticut Shade step up from Classic: velvety nuts and sweet wood for coffee-first sessions.
priceNote: Representative toro MSRP; other vitolas vary.
sizeNote: Distinct from HTD-04 Classic and HTD-02 ESG.

notes: parent_company: Ashton | Ashton portfolio — Sweet & savory wildcard — naturally sweet broadleaf maduro for contrast pairings.
wrapperRole: Fermented Connecticut Broadleaf brings molasses, dark cocoa, and raisin sweetness.
binderRole: Dominican binder supports even burn through the sweet wrapper.
fillerRole: Dominican filler adds cedar backbone without overwhelming the maduro finish.
flavorNotes: molasses, dark cocoa, sweet raisins, cedar, smooth finish
bestFor: Heavy tannic red wine, dark porter, rich espresso, contrast wildcard flights.
avoidIf: User wants dry, ultra-mild Connecticut only.
whyRecommend: Recommend as Ashton contrast pick against bitter espresso or tannic pours — maduro sweetness, not VSG spice bomb.
catalogLine: Ashton Aged Maduro · 5 × 50 · Robusto · Medium-Full · Dominican · $14 · Notes: molasses, dark cocoa, sweet raisins
memberBlurb: Ashton Aged Maduro — broadleaf sweetness for after-dinner contrast; pairs with espresso and Cabernet-style reds.
sizeNote: Contrast wildcard within Ashton single-brand flights.

notes: parent_company: Ashton | Ashton portfolio — Refined Option tier — balanced medium-full with white pepper, cinnamon, herbal sweetness.

notes: parent_company: Ashton | Ashton portfolio — Full-bodied powerhouse — My Father-made; espresso, dark chocolate, front-end pepper.
wrapperRole: Nicaraguan Habano wrapper drives espresso, cocoa, and sharp spice up front.
binderRole: Nicaraguan binder supports Garcia-family combustion and strength.
fillerRole: Nicaraguan filler delivers full body, dark chocolate, and pepper kick.
flavorNotes: espresso, dark chocolate, pepper, earth, cedar
bestFor: Stout, heavy port, rye whiskey, bold espresso, Ashton full-body Best Pick slot.
